issues.description: Action sequence is wrong. Should start with DrawCard (look at 2 cards from top of deck), not RevealFromHand. RevealFromHand is for cards already in hand.
Missing condition: 'If you have 6 or less cards in your hand' must be added as a condition before the action executes.

Action structure incorrect. Should be: DrawCard 2 from deck → reveal up to 1 Dressrosa → add to hand → trash rest. Current DSL attempts RevealFromHand then SearchDeck which doesn't match the effect flow.
Missing: 'Cannot attack' passive effect. Leader has a static ability that should be represented separately or noted.
